strengths: Maintained steady traction throughout the cutting sequence
Demonstrated good instrument coordination during circle following
Showed consistent cutting technique with appropriate scissor positioning
weaknesses: Failed to complete the full circle cut, leaving the task incomplete
Took excessive time (215 seconds) indicating inefficient cutting progression
Did not achieve proper circle release at task completion

drills.name: Circle tracking quarter-cuts
drills.description: Cut the circle in four controlled quadrants while maintaining traction, ensuring complete separation in each section before moving to the next.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to complete the full circle cut.

drills.name: Traction-angle practice
drills.description: 10 repetitions of repositioning the Maryland to improve scissor entry angle and cutting efficiency.
drills.targets_weakness: Took excessive time indicating inefficient cutting progression.

drills.name: Edge-entry rehearsal
drills.description: 15 starts from the gauze edge to a marked line without overshoot, focusing on complete cut-through verification.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not achieve proper circle release at task completion.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your solid cutting technique into complete task execution. Verify full circle separation before considering the task finished.
